import pandas as pd


def process_sales_data(filepath: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = pd.read_csv(filepath)
    df_filtered = df[df["amount"] > 0]
    df_grouped = df_filtered.groupby("region").agg({"amount": "sum"})
    df_sorted = df_grouped.sort_values("amount", ascending=False)
    df_ranked = df_sorted.assign(rank=range(1, len(df_sorted) + 1))
    df_final = df_ranked.reset_index()
    return df_final


def enrich_customer_data(customers: pd.DataFrame, orders: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    merged = customers.merge(orders, on="customer_id")
    filtered = merged[merged["status"] == "completed"]
    aggregated = filtered.groupby("customer_id").agg({"total": "sum", "order_id": "count"})
    renamed = aggregated.rename(columns={"total": "total_spent", "order_id": "order_count"})
    final = customers.merge(renamed, on="customer_id", how="left")
    return final
